title: The Cursed of Satan Temptation
overview: An ustad exorcist expert in a remote village attacked by a powerful demon. When the exorcist tries to perform an exorcism to drive out the demon, the demon instead enters the exorcist's family and begins to tempt and threaten the safety of the exorcist's family.
